sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الِاسْتِعْدَادَاتُ لِمُقَابَلَةِ الْعَمَلِ أَمْرًا يَتَجَاوَزُ مُجَرَّدَ مُرَاجَعَةِ السِّيرَةِ الذَّاتِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema za intervju za posao je nešto što prevazilazi puki pregled biografije.
sentences.translationEn: Preparing for a job interview is something that goes beyond just reviewing a CV.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ الْبَحْثُ عَنْ رُؤْيَةِ الشَّرِكَةِ وَإِنْجَازَاتِهَا الْأَخِيرَةِ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je istražiti viziju kompanije i njena nedavna dostignuća na tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: It is essential to research the company's vision and its recent achievements in the market.

sentences.arabic: خِلَالَ الْمُقَابَلَةِ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُرَشَّحِ أَنْ يُظْهِرَ الثِّقَةَ وَيُجِيبَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِوُضُوحٍ وَدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Tokom intervjua, kandidat mora pokazati samopouzdanje i odgovarati na pitanja jasno i precizno.
sentences.translationEn: During the interview, the candidate must show confidence and answer questions clearly and precisely.

sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ لُغَةُ الْجَسَدِ دَوْرًا حَيَوِيًّا فِي نَقْلِ الِاحْتِرَافِيَّةِ وَالْحَمَاسِ لِلْمَنْصِبِ.
sentences.translation: Govor tijela igra vitalnu ulogu u prenošenju profesionalizma i entuzijazma za poziciju.
sentences.translationEn: Body language plays a vital role in conveying professionalism and enthusiasm for the position.

sentences.arabic: أَخِيرًا، فَإِنَّ طَرْحَ أَسْئِلَةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ حَوْلَ ثَقَافَةِ الْفَرِيقِ يَعْكِسُ اهْتِمَامًا حَقِيقِيًّا بِالْوَظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Konačno, postavljanje dubokih pitanja o kulturi tima odražava istinski interes za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Finally, asking insightful questions about the team culture reflects a genuine interest in the job.
